description: TWA (Trusted Web Activity) GitHub Actions workflow to build Android APK/AAB wrapping the web app as a native Android app. Includes assetlinks.json for Digital Asset Links verification.
steps: Create apps/web/public/.well-known/assetlinks.json with Digital Asset Links for TWA verification. Content: [{"relation":["delegate_permission/common.handle_all_urls"],"target":{"namespace":"android_app","package_name":"in.msmsupermarket.app","sha256_cert_fingerprints":["__SIGNING_KEY_SHA256__"]}}]. The placeholder fingerprint will be replaced with the actual signing key.

Create a TWA Android project structure under apps/twa/: Include app/build.gradle.kts, build.gradle.kts (root), settings.gradle.kts, gradle.properties, app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml, app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml, app/src/main/res/values/colors.xml. The TWA uses the standard Android Browser Helper library (com.google.androidbrowserhelper:androidbrowserhelper:2.5.0) to launch the PWA in a Custom Tab with TWA mode. Configure: host=msmsupermarket.in, startUrl=/?source=twa, package=in.msmsupermarket.app, themeColor=#050505, backgroundColor=#F7F7FA, icons from /icons/icon-512.png.

Create .github/workflows/build-twa.yml: Triggered on push to main (paths: apps/twa/**) and workflow_dispatch. Jobs: setup JDK 17, setup Android SDK (build-tools 34.0.0, platform android-34), build the TWA APK using ./gradlew assembleRelease (or assembleDebug for CI). Sign with debug keystore for CI artifacts (release signing uses repository secrets KEYSTORE_BASE64, KEYSTORE_PASSWORD, KEY_ALIAS, KEY_PASSWORD). Upload APK/AAB as artifact. Cache Gradle dependencies.
Add a Gradle wrapper (gradlew, gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties) to apps/twa/ pointing to Gradle 8.5.

Ensure the manifest.webmanifest at apps/web/app/manifest.ts already references the play store listing (it does: related_applications with id 'in.msmsupermarket.app'). Verify prefer_related_applications is false so the PWA install prompt still shows.
acceptance_criteria: apps/web/public/.well-known/assetlinks.json exists with correct Digital Asset Links format
.github/workflows/build-twa.yml exists and defines a complete build pipeline
apps/twa/ directory contains a valid Android project that builds a TWA
TWA Android project uses com.google.androidbrowserhelper library
Build workflow uploads APK as artifact
Gradle wrapper files exist in apps/twa/
